# Doc image audit exclusions.
#
# Images listed here are intentionally hand-crafted and are NOT auto-generated
# by a doc_image:/doc_animation: scenario.  One repo-relative path per line.
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
#
# To convert a hand-crafted image to an auto-generated one, add a
# doc_image:/doc_animation: key to a scenario YAML and remove the entry here.

# Existing hand-crafted assets committed before automated doc-image generation
# was introduced.  These may be replaced with generated versions over time.
docs/source/chapter/assets/example.gif
docs/source/chapter/assets/lights_overlay_button.png
docs/source/chapter/assets/nested.png
docs/source/chapter/assets/clear_router.png
docs/source/chapter/assets/editor.png
docs/source/chapter/assets/logo.png
docs/source/chapter/assets/pplogo.png
docs/source/chapter/assets/styling1.png
docs/source/chapter/assets/styling2.png
docs/source/chapter/assets/styling3.png
